name: dispatch_to_agent
description: Send a message directly to another Blum home agent, bypassing the room server. The agent receives it as if dispatched from the boardroom and will run a full inference cycle. Use for agent-to-agent tasking, delegation, or direct questions. Agent ports are discovered automatically — use the agent's name (e.g. 'beta', 'keter', 'selah', 'lens', 'ami').

body.description: Message body — the task, question, or instruction for the agent
